title: 3 LED Dynamo Squeeze Action Rechargeable Flashlight Camping Hiking -No Batteries
description:
The three LED super bright dynamo squeeze action rechargeable flashlight requires no batteries! For being so little this guy is powerful. The 3 LED's encased in the main housing can put out a 15 lumens of brightness that will shine as long as you need it too. At only four inches in length the mini emergency dynamo flashlight is a keepsake that can be stored anywhere you may find yourself in trouble during a power outage or storm including your vehicle trunk or glove box, kitchen junk drawer, garage, outdoor camping and hiking in the wilderness The emergency use flashlight is a long duration survival flashlight that needs no batteries to operate. The Built-In Squeeze Action trigger winds interior gears give the bulb energy to shine its light wherever you point it

3 LED Dynamo Squeeze Action Rechargeable Flashlight Camping Hiking -No Batteries

The three LED super bright dynamo squeeze action rechargeable flashlight requires no batteries!

For being so little this guy is powerful. The 3 LED's encased in the main housing can put out a 15 lumens of brightness that will shine as long as you need it too. At only four inches in length the mini emergency dynamo flashlight is a keepsake that can be stored anywhere you may find yourself in trouble during a power outage or storm including your vehicle trunk or glove box, kitchen junk drawer, garage, outdoor camping and hiking in the wilderness

Key Features

  • SUPER BRIGHT: For being so little this rechargeable flashlight is powerful. The 3 LED's encased in the main housing can put out 15 lumens of brightness that will shine as long as you need it too
  • ULTRA COMPACT: At only 4 inches in length the mini emergency dynamo flashlight is a keepsake that can be stored anywhere you may find yourself in trouble during a power outage or storm including your vehicle trunk or glove box, kitchen junk drawer, garage, outdoor camping or hiking in the wilderness
  • SEE THROUGH CASE: See the inner workings of how this flashlight produces power and converts it to energy. A optimal learning and enjoyment exercise in mechanical engineering with children in science class
  • NO BATTERIES NEEDED: The emergency use flashlight is a long duration survival flashlight that needs no batteries to operate. The Built-In Squeeze Action trigger winds interior gears give the bulb energy to shine its light wherever you point it
  • Nylon Wrist Strap Included

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 3SDF-973
  • UPC: 781550251981
  • Color: Blue
  • Size: 4 in x 2 in x 0.5 in

The emergency use flashlight is a long duration survival flashlight that needs no batteries to operate. The Built-In Squeeze Action trigger winds interior gears give the bulb energy to shine its light wherever you point it.

See the inner workings of how this flashlight produces power and converts it to energy. A optimal learning and enjoyment exercise in mechanical engineering with children in science class

This flashlight has a built-in squeeze action to recharge itself anywhere and with its nylon strap is great for emergencies, travel, outdoor activities,and more!

You'll definitely want to have this flashlight with you the next time you're camping, climbing, hiking, or adventuring outdoors. It's compact and ready to go, making it a fine solution for unexpected power outages and other dark situations.
